Daydream.lyrics:
I can feel the light 
 leave my eyes 
 when I wake up from this paradise 
 I can feel the light 
 leave my eyes... 
 I can feel the light 
 leave my eyes 
 when I wake up from this paradise 
 I got no one else too 
 by my side 
 baby stay, baby stay 
 first thing i see in the morning 
 is a random reel that's quite boring 
 used to feel free, now I'm drowning...
 INSTRUMENTAL BREAK 
 I can't dream at night, so I daydream 
 I can't deal with all your, fake scenes 
 It's the best thing, to stare at screens 
 makes you not scream, now that's a routine 
 first thing i see in the morning 
 is a random reel that's quite boring 
 used to feel free, now I'm drowning 
 is the food free there I aint borrowing 
 money, it causes problems and it fixes them too 
 wish I had a lot of it then do it times 2 
 that's what i daydream , that's the first line 
 you treat life like a game, I just live mine 
 she my girl and she looks just too fine 
 can't comprehend? ok bitch get in line 
 it's my DAYDREAM I'm the king here 
 it's my DAYDREAM I'm the king here

Heatwave.lyrics:
Heat rising, can't escape...
Pulse pounding, heart beats fast...
Summer nights that forever last...

For You.lyrics:
Echoes in the void...
Whispers of the unknown...
Time stands still, forever shown...
